description_long: This is a cylindrical orange prescription medicine bottle with a white, ribbed, child-resistant cap. The bottle is semi-transparent, revealing several oblong, light-colored tablets inside. A white label wraps around the bottle, featuring printed text with the medication name 'Ciprofloxacin 80mg', patient information, dosage instructions, and pharmacy details. The label also includes a small red and white logo near the bottom. The bottle is made of translucent orange plastic, and the cap appears to be opaque white plastic. The overall appearance is typical of prescription medication containers dispensed by pharmacies in urban environments.
description: An orange translucent prescription bottle with a white child-resistant cap and a detailed pharmacy label, containing visible tablets inside.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full pharmacy label with medication name, patient details, and a red and white logo.
description_view_1: Side view with partial label visible and a clear view of the orange plastic and tablets inside.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the orange translucent bottle and tablets, with no label visible.
description_view_3: Angled side view showing part of the label and the tablets inside the bottle.
